plugins.name: HLL Weather
plugins.description: Weather forecast dashboard section powered by Open-Meteo (no API key required). Server-side fetching, configurable location with city search, per-user themes including animated pixel art, and coordinate-precision privacy rounding.

plugins.name: Uptime Kuma
plugins.description: Shows Uptime Kuma status-page monitors natively on the launcher dashboard: public group mapping, 24-heartbeat sparklines, response-time metrics, pulsing status badges, and a persistent SQLite cache for instant loads.

plugins.name: Miniflux RSS
plugins.description: Displays unread Miniflux articles on the dashboard with compact rows, relative publish times, source feed labels, optional category grouping, per-user article counts, and mark-as-read actions.

plugins.name: Proxmox VE
plugins.description: Shows Proxmox VE nodes, their current resource load, and the VMs and LXC containers running on them with live details including CPU, memory, disk, network, and IP addresses.

plugins.name: SearXNG Search
plugins.description: Adds a native, private SearXNG search section with categories, language and time filters, instant answers, result-engine details, and server-side guarded proxying.
